signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +9,833,912 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹23,687
signals.desc: Spot within 0.2% of zero-gamma (23,687). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = +182.9Cr. Dealers LONG gamma: volatility suppression. Expect range-bound price; premium selling favored.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,775 — NIFTY

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 22.7%

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹24,500
